message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "halon" as halon
participant "ios1" as ios1
participant "ios2" as ios2
participant "client" as client

note right of ios2: SNS operation

activate ios1
activate ios2
halon -> ios2 : m0_spie1_repair_abort
deactivate ios1 #red
deactivate ios2 #red

group loop until all IOS are in [IDLE,FAILED]
    halon -> ios2 : repair status request
    ios2 -> halon : repair status reply
end

halon -> client : notify [(pool, PREVIOUS_STATE), (disk, PREVIOUS_STATE)]

@enduml
```
